svg.text: Shared workstations. Sensitive data. Automated secure push to Azure — zero trust enforced at every step.
no read · no list · no delete
Entra ID sign-in event logged per push
KV audit event logged per Get Secret
Storage write log: caller IP · blob name
Shared lab PCs are untrusted by design. Sensitive research files used to leave via USB, email, or shared drives — no audit trail, no access control.
This system automates secure push to tamper-proof cloud storage. No manual steps. No shared credentials. Every action logged and immutable.
📦 Pull-down deployable: git clone + .\Deploy.ps1 — creates all Azure resources, bootstraps workstations, no manual portal steps.
NEVER TRUST · ALWAYS VERIFY · ENFORCE AT EVERY BOUNDARY
